info.title: Docket Alarm API
info.description: Access Docket Alarm's database of 675M+ court dockets. Search, retrieve case information, track cases, and manage sub-accounts.

post.summary: Authenticate and get a temporary token
post.description: Send username and password to receive a temporary login token valid for 90 minutes.

get.description: Query Docket Alarm's database of 675M+ dockets.

parameters.name: scroll
parameters.description: Scroll token for paginating large result sets

get.description: Search PACER/Federal courts directly. Incurs PACER fees ($0.10 per search page).

get.summary: Get search options for state/agency courts
get.description: GET with no parameters to list courts, or with court parameter to get search options for that court.

parameters.name: court
parameters.description: Court identifier to get search options for

post.description: Search state and agency courts directly with court-specific parameters.

get.summary: Get docket information for a case
get.description: Download a case's docket information including parties, filings, and related cases.
Retrieve a list of tracked cases and their status.

post.summary: Create or modify a case tracker
post.description: Create a new tracker, modify an existing one, or test push notifications.

get.description: Generate an encrypted login link for sub-account single sign-on.
Download a PDF document from a docket entry. Returns binary PDF on success.
Retrieve the motion/pleading classification data dictionary with SALI codes.

post.description: Generate a shareable page link for non-authenticated users.

get.description: Extract judgment information from a case using AI.

get.summary: Ask a question about a docket
get.description: Query a docket with natural language questions using AI.
Extract causes of action from a case using AI.
Extract attorney billing rate information using AI.
Find cases using partial information with AI.
Generate search queries from natural language using AI.
Normalize entity names to Docket Alarm search format using AI.
Match case type to area of law classification using AI.
Match court to forum/venue classification using AI.

data.description: Motion identifier mappings and SALI codes

tokenAuth.name: login_token
tokenAuth.description: Temporary login token obtained from the login endpoint
